lesson: Keep provider-specific and channel-specific behavior behind adapters; domain and application code should depend on stable product concepts and ports, not SDK payloads or runtime wiring.
Risky tool execution must pass through deterministic permission evaluation and sandbox policy before any provider callback or runner grants access.
Runtime state, jobs, control events, and memory use Postgres as the production storage model; schema or repository changes need repository tests and architecture/docs updates when contracts shift.

When replacing Postgres runtime schema in one cut, move active runtime persistence behind canonical Drizzle repositories/services in the same change; leaving schema-owned raw SQL or old table definitions creates drift and runtime failures after destructive migrations.
source: PR review findings for canonical domain schema cutover

lesson: Keep route projection rows distinct from durable AgentConversationBinding records; control binding enable/update should use live-only whole-conversation projection and must skip thread-scoped bindings.
Do not fetch approved remote MCP hostnames with the original hostname after a single DNS validation; reject hostnames until outbound transport pins the validated address.
For headed browser sessions, set the visible window size at launch with Chrome args; CDP window bounds or late resize calls do not reliably prevent first-page 0x0/tiny viewport state.

Browser IPC authorization must run before usage settings lookup, active-tab resolution, backend dispatch, or per-site usage metering so stale signed requests after Browser revocation cannot consume buckets.
source: review: Neutral Browser Hardening P2 authorization before metering

lesson: In Browser usage enforce mode, backend current-tab URLs must normalize to a registrable site; internal or local URLs must fail closed instead of falling back to stale remembered or unknown site state.
source: review: Neutral Browser Hardening P2 unnormalizable active tab URL

lesson: When memory IPC auth scope includes per-run reviewer authority, every runner boundary must forward memoryReviewerIsControlApprover into the MyClaw MCP server env; otherwise approver runs sign memory_search and continuity_summary requests with a different scope than runtime verification.
